beer.beer_description: From the misunderstood artist to the boundary-pushing entrepreneur, our Interloper Hazy IPA’s a beer for the misfits and the big-dreamers – for those who vibrate on a different frequency to the rest. Here in the Valley, everyone’s welcome to become part of the jumble of people that make this place unique. This distinctive beer with its malty fullness, silky mouthfeel and citrus aromas is a toast to the interlopers.

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 215 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 44!

The traditionally accepted payment for helping someone move, pizza & beer are one of the most perfect combinations in life. That's a beer at 5 different venues categorized as a Pizza Place. Try 5 more for Level 2!

items.badge_description: There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 245 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 50!

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 230 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 47!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 80 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 17!

items.badge_description: You’ve unlocked Haze of the Cosmos! Today’s featured style earns double points toward your faction. Your check-ins and toasts help decide which icon arrives in Untappd next year. Visit Recappd to explore your stats! Recappd is presented by Crescent Canna: Try the bestselling THC drinks in the country and get FREE THC gummies with your purchase. Add any THC drink to your cart and use code: GUMTAPPD. Shop Now >
